subcodes.first_line: My heart, O my God, is consumed in the fire of separation from Thee, and my liver hath melted, O my Beloved, in my remoteness from the ocean of Thy good-pleasure [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد احترق قلبی یا الهی من نار فراقک و ذاب کبدی یا محبوبی فی بعدی عن بحر رضائک
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for protection, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @purpose; goal of creation, @prayer for assistance; intercession
